data.body: WS6 (dork-quota-zeal) LANDED locally: commit 723f30f1c. A1/T5a small-scale default + prohibited-reasoning + two-directional; one-way blast_radius 'never raises' in both verifier prompts + SeverityAttrs field doc; G-9 finder fire/no-fire cases + FP-3b verifier blast_radius pair (split by layer per plan-review advisory). Closed w/ both attestations. 2/11 done (WS1, WS6). Stack: WS1 4f20635dd -> WS6 723f30f1c on main 6a28e9a5a. Next: WS7 prompt-hardening.
